sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96944" key="stoixhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στοιχ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n96944.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must agree with</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινι</itype> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">98</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
